message: 🌱 Add spire: Smarter Authorized Entry Caching mission (#608)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "spire-2182-smarter-authorized-entry-caching",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "spire: Smarter Authorized Entry Caching",
+    "description": "Smarter Authorized Entry Caching. Requested by 6+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current spire deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your spire version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n spire -l app.kubernetes.io/name=spire\nhelm list -n spire 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working spire installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review spire configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant spire configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n spire -l app.kubernetes.io/name=spire\nkubectl get configmap -n spire -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=spire\n```\nIn 0.12.0 we introduced a full in-memory authorized entry cache."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Smarter Authorized Entry Caching",
+        "description": "Uses an event in sql to build the cache. Rather than fetch the whole table every 5 seconds, get only the events that occurred since the last fetch.\n\nCreates a new table in the sql database and a bunch of triggers. For example when a new entry is created the trigger will create an entry in the entry events table. SPIRE will read this table and update the in memory cache.\n\nCode to prune the event table is missing in this draft.\n\nSee the fix PR for details: linked PR"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n spire -l app.kubernetes.io/name=spire\nkubectl get events -n spire --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Smarter Authorized Entry Caching\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Uses an event in sql to build the cache. Rather than fetch the whole table every 5 seconds, get only the events that occurred since the last fetch.\n\nCreates a new table in the sql database and a bunch of triggers. For example when a new entry is created the trigger will create an entry in the entry events table. SPIRE will read this table and update the in memory cache.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "spire",
+      "graduated",
+      "security",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "spire"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Deployment"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",

+    ],

+      "pr": "https://github.com/spiffe/spire/pull/4227"
+    },

+  },

+      "kubectl"
